---
title: "Political Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial dimensions of political power, borders, states, and geopolitics."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---




Welcome to the **Political Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course examines how political power is organized spatially — from the formation of nation-states and boundary disputes to contemporary geopolitical rivalries and electoral geography.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Boundaries and Frontiers (with special reference to India).**
* **Heartland and Rimland Theories.**
* **Trends and Developments in Political Geography.**
* **Geography of Federalism, Electoral Reforms in India, Determinants of Electoral Behaviour.**
* **Geopolitics of Climate Change, Geopolitics of World Resources, Geo-politics of India Ocean.**
* **Regional Organisations of Cooperation (SAARC, ASEAN, OPEC, EU), Neopolitics of World Natural Resources.**

---

{{< include political-geography/boundaries-and-frontiers.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/boundaries-frontiers.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/concept-of-nation-state-and-nation-state.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/contemporary-geopolitics.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/course-content.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/cross-border-terrorism.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/definition-and-scope.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/electoral-geography.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/emergence-of-new-states.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/foundations-of-political-geography.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/geographical-basis-of-indian-federalism.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/geography-and-federalism.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/geopolitical-theories.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/geopolitics-and-global-strategic-views.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/geopolitics-of-south-asia-and-indian-ocean-realm.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/heartland-theory.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/indias-role-in-world-affairs.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/international-boundary-of-india-and-related-issues.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/politics-of-world-resources.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/regional-consciousness-and-inter-state-issues.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/rimland-theory.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/state-nation-sovereignty.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/state-reorganisation.md >}}
